product-owner.description: Invoke when a new feature, change request, or product requirement needs to be defined. Writes user stories with acceptance criteria and immediately delegates to project-manager. Never writes code.

project-manager.description: Invoke after product-owner delivers a user story. Breaks stories into tasks, assigns backend tasks to backend-lead and frontend tasks to frontend-lead. Never writes code. Always calls both leads in the same response.

backend-lead.description: Invoke when backend tasks arrive from project-manager. Assesses task complexity and immediately delegates to senior-backend (complex/moderate) or junior-backend (simple CRUD/tests). Also invoke for backend architecture decisions and API design.

frontend-lead.description: Invoke when frontend tasks arrive from project-manager. Assesses task complexity and immediately delegates to senior-frontend (complex components/SSR/state) or junior-frontend (simple styling/tests). Also invoke for frontend architecture decisions.

senior-backend.description: Invoke for complex backend tasks: new architecture, third-party integrations, ClickHouse queries, Octane/Swoole-sensitive code, complex Eloquent, queue/event design, security-critical flows. Implements with full tool access.

senior-frontend.description: Invoke for complex frontend tasks: new Inertia page components, Pinia stores, composables, SSR-sensitive code, complex Vue state, Inertia shared data changes. Implements with full tool access.

junior-backend.description: Invoke for simple, well-defined backend tasks: CRUD endpoints following existing patterns, migration files, unit tests for existing Actions, isolated bug fixes. Does not make architectural decisions.

junior-frontend.description: Invoke for simple, well-defined frontend tasks: Tailwind styling fixes, small presentational components following existing patterns, component tests. Does not touch Inertia config, Pinia stores, or SSR setup.

tester.description: Invoke after any feature is implemented. Writes test plans, creates PHPUnit/Pest tests, verifies acceptance criteria, and reports bugs with severity. Also invoked before any PR is merged.

researcher.description: Invoke when evaluating a new package, library, or architectural pattern. Researches options, evaluates Octane/Swoole compatibility, and produces a comparison report with recommendation. Never writes production code.

debugger.description: Invoke when a bug's root cause is not immediately obvious. Reads code, logs, and stack traces to produce a root cause analysis and fix recommendation. Never modifies code — analysis only.

code-reviewer.description: Invoke before any PR is merged. Reviews for Octane static state issues, N+1 queries, ClickHouse misuse, SSR-unsafe frontend code, security vulnerabilities, and adherence to coding standards. Produces severity-labeled report.

architect.description: Invoke before introducing a new service, significantly changing DB schema, adding a new queue/event pattern, or making any decision with cross-cutting architectural impact. Writes ADRs and evaluates Octane/Swoole implications.
